title: G.SKILL Trident Z Royal RGB 64GB (4×16GB) DDR4 4266MHz CL19 F4-4266C19Q-64GTES
description: Description G.SKILL Trident Z Royal RGB F4-4266C19Q-64GTES | 64GB (4×16GB) DDR4 4266MHz CL19 For sale is a high-end G.SKILL Trident Z Royal RGB DDR4 memory kit, model F4-4266C19Q-64GTES. This is a premium enthusiast-grade kit, combining extreme frequency performance with the iconic Royal mirror-finish heat spreaders and RGB lighting. Removed from a demo / display system, the modules have seen very little actual use. The Royal heat spreaders still have the original factory protective film attached, confirming their near-new condition.
